data.name: ZVtok — AI TikTok studio
data.description: TikTok content engine (Claude Code tips carousels + real bug-fix documentary videos) that sells ZVlabs digital products — Claude Code packs and workflow tooling — on Gumroad. First milestone: 10–20 organic sales.
data.nextStep: Neil confirms whether the motion clips actually work as TikTok carousel slides (convert MP4 -> Live Photo via a free phone app -> insert into carousel picker -> enable loop when posting) — not yet tested end-to-end. Once confirmed either way: run real topic research (WebSearch) for the next Track C topic (MCP, LLM, or context window) before writing it, rather than guessing. Full current-state writeup is in ~/Claude/zvtok/CLAUDE.md under 'Current state' — read that first in a fresh session.
data.lastDid: Long build session on c01-what-is-claude-code (the first Track C beginner post). Locked the visual direction (light 'Paper Editorial' template, cream halftone + red accent, per Neil's 'I like the light versions always'). Built a real smooth-video pipeline from scratch with no Homebrew on this machine: a static ffmpeg binary + puppeteer-core driving the existing Chrome via native screencast, after researching Remotion seriously and passing on it over a license restriction on automated rendering. Gave all 6 slides of the post a motion companion clip (animated icons matching each slide's static graphic), changed the CTA from 'save this' to 'follow' per Neil's request (goal is followers, not saves), and fixed a tone problem where earlier copy assumed the beginner viewer already knew how to code. Consolidated a sprawling session log into a clean 'current state' reference in CLAUDE.md.
data.notes:
• Single account (existing ZVlabs TikTok, @zvlabs), personal not business (keeps trending sounds; bio link unlocks at ~1,000 followers)
• Track A: tips carousels 2–3×/week (growth) · Track B: documentary bug-fix videos, irregular (conversion)
• Products: one-time Gumroad files ~$5–$15; first product = iOS PWA polish kit built on ~/Claude/dock-issue
• Inbound only — no ads, no cold outreach; cross-post videos to YouTube Shorts as a free hedge
• Claude leads writing/engineering/slides/analytics; Neil records, voices, posts (~2–4 hrs/wk)
• Realistic expectations: 10–20 sales in ~2–3 months is the win condition, not big income
• performance-log.md tracks per-post views/saves/shares/follows, reviewed weekly

log.text: Built the full c01-what-is-claude-code post with motion clips on every slide, locked the light visual template, stood up a Homebrew-free real-video pipeline (ffmpeg + puppeteer screencast) after evaluating and passing on Remotion, and changed CTA messaging to push follows instead of saves.

Fresh-start pivot per Neil's feedback: archived the old 9-post batch (not deleted), rebuilt the template system with a real design system dir and a hard automated dash-lint gate, opened a new Track C for beginner fundamentals content, and built + QA'd its first post ('What is Claude Code?') in a new Paper Editorial visual template plus one alternate black+coral option for Neil to choose between.

Built and shipped the first Track A tips carousel ("5 Claude Code features most people never find") via fable-planner plan + execution: reusable HTML/CSS -> headless Chrome render pipeline, 7 QA'd 1080x1440 slides, caption, delivered to ~/Downloads ready to post. Verified Gumroad/Payhip fees at source; confirmed Gumroad-only for now is fine since bio link needs ~1,000 followers regardless. Set up performance-log.md.

Founded the venture. Reviewed the ZVlabs TikTok+Gumroad strategy brief, verified the market on Gumroad (competitor Claude Code packs exist; outcomes sell, collections don't), delivered the viability verdict (viable as low-risk build, not near-term income), and made two calls: keep the dock-bug as the first documentary video but sell the whole iOS PWA polish kit as the product, and cross-post videos to YouTube Shorts. Set up ~/Claude/zvtok (CLAUDE.md handoff + original brief + Claude Code launcher) and this hub entry.
